Let me try moving UP to see if the W box follows and overlaps with the merged box.
Actually, looking at the positions:

- Merged box: row 24-31, col 28-31
They overlap in rows (28-31) but not in columns (24-27 vs 28-31). To merge, they need to overlap in both dimensions.
Since I can't move RIGHT, maybe I need to move the player in a different way. Let me try moving UP first, then RIGHT.
